title: Inversion
description: This texture pack inverts the color of every texture in the game
body:
This texture pack inverts the textures of everything in Minecraft. From blocks, to items, to entities, nothing is safe. (Except for the panorama. That got away)


# See the world in a whole new light!

This pack makes the 16 colored block in the Minecraft inventory unreconizeable!

![The "Colored Blocks" UI in Minecraft, with inverted textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f828ed57927b16f1f5d4a58a0e4e0675146fc29c_0.webp)

# Icons destroyed!

The iconic green and white creeper? Forget about it! It's purple now.

![A purple and black creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b303d35ce48ec682a207d645620dd60d46480a9f_0.webp)

Redstone! Forget it! Bluestone is now in favor!

![A pile of Minecraft Redstone components](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d58591a14cc040e7d08014337806de70d27a209.png)
